story.outputformat.critique:
Return ONLY a JSON object:
{
  "rationale": ["reason 1", "reason 2"],
  "critique": "Your detailed critique here...",
  "replacement": "Suggested revised text (if applicable)",
  "alternatives": [{"label": "Option name", "text": "Alternative text"}]
}
story.outputformat.continueWriting:
Return ONLY a JSON object:
{
  "rationale": ["why you continued this way"],
  "replacement": "The continuation text that follows naturally from the selected text",
  "alternatives": [{"label": "Option name", "text": "Alternative continuation"}]
}
Note: For 'Continue', the replacement should be NEW text to append AFTER the selected text, not a rewrite of it.
